raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag tchis Wihr̄s Ka-
nijus weena nizzinajama iskaisti-
ta Elka Bilde? jeb irr wiꞥſch
weens Tranks/ kas neweenam
patihk? Kapehz irr wiꞥſch un
winna Dsimmums atmesti wee-
nā Semmê/ ko tee ne pasihst?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak Semme! Semme!
Semme! klaust ta KUNGA
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tasKUNGS:
Uherakſit scho Wihrn par Ne-
auglign/ weenn Wihrn/ kam
fawu Muhschu labbi ne isdoh-
fees. Jo neweenam no winna
Dsimnuma labbi klahfees/ kas
fehdeht warretu us Dahwida
Gohda-Krehſlu/ un wairs eekſch
Juha waldiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": �,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIII. Nodalla.
Jeremijus draude teem wiltigeem Prauwee-
scheem bahrgas Sohdibas: 1/etc. Apsoh-
la/ ka teem Utlikkutcheem fawu Kauschu/buhs
pee ta Messijasa Walstibas pee.aizinateem
knuht: 3.etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Aj jums juhs Ganni!
kas juhs mannas Gan-
nibas Awis nomaita-
jat/ un iskaifat/ fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
KUNGS/ tas Israëta Deetws/
no teem Ganneem/ kas mannas
Landis ganna: Juhs effat man-
nas Awis iskaitiſcht/ un effat
tahs isdsinnuschi / un ne effet
tahs peemeklejſchi. Rangi / Es
peemeckleschu juhs juhfo taunn
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fapulzinatchu pats
mannas atlilkutchas Awis no
wiﬀahm Semmebin/ kurp es
tahs etmu isdsinnis/ un atwed-
dischu tahs atkat uhs faweeim
Laidarecm/ un tahs buhs augli-
gas un wairofees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es eezelfchu pabr teem
Gannus/ kas tohs gannibs/ un
tahs ne bthfees wairs/ nedstaps
behdinatas/ nedg peemecketas/
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tahs Deenas
nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS: Ra-
es tam Dahwidam weenu taif-
nu Sarru uszelfchu/ un taßwal-
dihs weens kehninisch buhdams/
un winnam labbi isdohfees/ un
Wiꞥſch darrihs Teefu un Taif-
nibu wirs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Laika taps Juha
atpestita/ un Israëls dsihwohs
drohtſchi. Un tahs buhs winna
Wahrde/ ar ko wiꞥſch taps no-
tancts/ tas KUNGS muhsa
Taifniba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz rangi/ tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tasKUNGS:
Ra tee wairs ne fazzihs: Tik tee-
ſcham ka tas KUNGS dsihwo/
kas tohs Israëta Behrnus irr
isweddıs no Egiptes-Semmes:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tik terscham ka tas
KUNGS dsihwo/ kas to Dsim-
mumu ta Israëta Namma irr
isweddıs/ un irr to atweddıs
no tahs Semmes prett Seemeta-
Pust/ un no wiﬀahm Sem-
meuu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
